events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Kaiser Permanente San Francisco for client 1045. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal. Allergies: tree_nut, egg. Sodium ceiling 550 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Indian; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 5 meals/week, zone Richmond.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Rajma (Kidney Bean Curry) with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Chana Masala with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/550 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–75) ✓, no tree_nut/egg ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/550 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–75) ✓, no tree_nut/egg ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/550 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 45–75) ✓, no tree_nut/egg ✓.

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1045 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00 (Richmond group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1045: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
